implementation_summary.summary: CP00-870 continues the RP28 Marketplace descriptor-only P09 Claude review packet secondary workflow and permission/audit bridge across RP28.P09.M04.S01-RP28.P09.M05.S20 without executing review harnesses, Hermes runtime receipts, permission decisions, audit writes, product-state writes, or using real client data.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-870 RP28.P09.M04.S01-RP28.P09.M05.S20 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
